task_description: Improve PWA offline robustness for event LAN usage: expand SW cache to all JS files, add offline/reconnected UI banner, auto-refresh views after reconnect, and add single-retry for network errors in api.js.

verification.summary: 182 tests pass (174 existing + 8 new offline tests). All implementation verified: SW caches 36 JS files with v2, offline-banner shows/hides correctly, guardedView auto-refreshes on reconnect, api.js retries once on network error.
